_comment: Cheffy presentation config. Data, not code -- site-wide mascot appearance lives here; edit and rebuild, no component changes needed. Per-page Layout/Cheffy props still override 'corner' and 'personality'.
_chip: true = mascot sits on a soft circular chip button; false = the silhouette floats free as the button.
_colors: Any CSS color or var(). ink = the whole silhouette (hat, brim, eyes). chipBg/chipBorder only matter when chip=true.
_personality: Default ambience: dormant | subtle | lively. Archive pages pass 'dormant' via Layout regardless.
_notifications: Local reminder knobs. lunchTime = daily lunch ping (24h local). syncReminder = the end-of-week 'come re-sync next week's reminders' ping: fires the first <dow> at <time> after everything else in the synced week.
